tasks.title: Inspect issue 19 command and schema paths
tasks.description: Review the color command conversion and command response schema implementation tied to GitHub issue #19. Identify impacted files and confirm expected API v2 payload/response shapes.

tasks.title: Fix colorRgb packing and response schema
tasks.description: Update command conversion so colorRgb values are sent as packed integers for API v2, and adjust response parsing to accept the API's msg field without breaking existing consumers.

tasks.title: Add or update regression coverage
tasks.description: Add tests covering packed colorRgb serialization and successful parsing of command responses that return msg. Run the relevant test suite to verify the fix.

tasks.title: Fix release-blocking test expectations
tasks.description: Update remaining test expectations and error handling assertions affected by the issue #19 fix so the full release workflow passes.

tasks.title: Sync package version for npm publish
tasks.description: Update package metadata to a new patch version so npm publish matches the release tag and the automated release workflow can complete successfully.

tasks.title: Automate package version sync in releases
tasks.description: Update the release workflow so future tagged releases keep package metadata aligned with the release version before npm publish, and verify the workflow logic locally where possible.
